product_overview: ZMC is a Solana-based crowdfunding platform that helps students and first-time founders list ideas and raise a fixed $20,000 target from early backers. (See PRD Files page 1 for the platform concept and workflow.)
core_goals: Provide an easy public listing flow so zero-to-one founders can submit startup ideas with title, description and social links (PRD Files, page 1).
Enable community crowdfunding using Solana payments so supporters can contribute toward a uniform $20,000 target per project.
Surface discoverable project listings with funding progress and transparent investor lists to attract early backers.
Offer authenticated features for founders and investors: create startups, invest with SOL, and view a personal portfolio.
Keep interactions simple and resilient: clear loading states, validation/error handling, and wallet-connect prompts.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allow existing users to authenticate with email and password and access authenticated pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Click Login button -> Redirect to /startups
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Click Login button -> See error on invalid credentials

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Register a new user account including name, email, password and wallet address so they can create or back projects.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill name, email, password, wallet address -> Click Sign up button -> Redirect to /startups
Navigate to /signup -> Fill name, email, password, wallet address -> Click Sign up button -> See error on duplicate email or invalid input

features.name: Recent Startups List
features.description: Public listing page that shows recent startup cards with funding progress, countdown, valuation and quick access to details.
user_flows: Navigate to /startups -> See skeleton while loading -> See grid of startup cards with name, description, valuation, countdown, progress bar -> Click a card to open startup detail -> Redirect to /startup/:id
Navigate to /startups -> See skeleton while loading -> API returns error -> See error message and retry option

features.name: Startup Detail
features.description: Detailed view for a single startup including title, description, founder social links, valuation, funding countdown, progress bar, and invest flow (SOL).
user_flows: Navigate to /startup/:id -> See title, description, founder, valuation, countdown, progress bar, category tags -> If funding open and logged in and wallet connected, enter SOL amount -> Click Invest -> See success and updated progress bar

Navigate to /startup/:id -> See title, description, founder, valuation, countdown, progress bar, category tags -> If funding open and logged in but wallet not connected, enter SOL amount -> Click Invest -> Prompt to Connect wallet -> Connect wallet -> Click Invest -> See success

Navigate to /startup/:id -> See title, description, founder, valuation, countdown, progress bar, category tags -> Enter invalid SOL amount or amount exceeding remaining target -> Click Invest -> See validation error
Navigate to /startup/:id -> See title, description, founder, valuation, countdown, progress bar, category tags -> If funding closed, Enter amount -> Click Invest -> See funding closed error

features.name: Create Startup
features.description: Authenticated form for founders to submit a new startup (title, description, up to 4 category tags, optional founder social links).
user_flows: Navigate to /build -> If not authenticated, redirect to /login

Navigate to /build -> Fill startup name -> Fill description -> Select up to 4 category tags -> Optionally fill LinkedIn, X, Github URLs -> Click Create startup -> Redirect to /startup/:id or /startups and see new listing
Navigate to /build -> Fill startup name (missing required fields) -> Click Create startup -> See validation errors and highlight required fields

features.name: Portfolio
features.description: Authenticated page that lists the user's investments, showing startup, amount invested and stake information.
user_flows: Navigate to /portfolio -> If not authenticated, redirect to /login
Navigate to /portfolio -> See list of investments with startup, amount, stake -> Click a listed startup -> Redirect to /startup/:id
Navigate to /portfolio -> API returns error -> See error state and retry option

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public marketing landing page for ZMC that introduces the platform and funnels users to sign in or launch a startup.
user_flows: Navigate to /landing -> Scroll sections -> Click Sign In -> Redirect to /login
Navigate to /landing -> Scroll sections -> Click Launch AI Startup -> Redirect to /build (if not authenticated, redirect to /login)
Navigate to /landing -> Scroll sections -> Click a CTA while offline or API unavailable -> See offline/error banner

See error on duplicate email or invalid input
